name: square-commons

metadata.name: square-commons
metadata.summary: helper module containing common functions for all my python modules.

documentation:
# square_commons

## about

helper module containing common functions for all my python modules.

## installation

```shell
pip install square_commons
```

## usage

[reference](./usage)

## env

- python>=3.12.0

## changelog

### v1.2.0

- added make_request_json_output in api_utils.

### v1.1.0

- added api_utils with get_api_output_in_standard_format.

### v1.0.0

- initial version with config reading methods.

## Feedback is appreciated. Thank you!

classes.name: square_commons.config_reader.ConfigReader

methods.name: square_commons.config_reader.ConfigReader.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the ConfigReader with the path to the configuration file.

```
param file_path

Path of the configuration file.
```

methods.name: square_commons.config_reader.ConfigReader.read_configuration
documentation:
Reads the configuration file and returns its contents as a dictionary.

```
return

Dictionary with section names as keys and dictionaries of key-value pairs as values.
```

methods.name: square_commons.config_reader.ConfigReader._read_environment_configuration_variables
documentation:
Reads environment variables for the given section. Falls back to configuration file if not found in OS.

```
param section

Section name in the configuration file.

param variables

List of variable names to retrieve.

return

Dictionary of key-value pairs where keys are variable names and values are their values.
```

methods.name: square_commons.config_reader.ConfigReader._read_configuration_variable
documentation:
Reads a single configuration variable from the given section.

```
param section

Section name in the configuration file.

param variable_name

Name of the configuration variable.

return

The value of the configuration variable.
```
A class to manage configuration settings from a file and environment variables.
